action_mappings_indef.release_claimed_time_slot: release a claimed time slot candidate {} for a recall case {}

action_mappings_indef.release_provisional_time_block: release a provisional time block {} from a recall case {}

predicate_mappings.case_allocated_slot: the case {} is allocated the slot {}
predicate_mappings.case_slot_claimed: the slot for the case {} is claimed
predicate_mappings.patient_contact_confirmed: the patient contact for {} is confirmed
predicate_mappings.contact_attempt_recorded: a contact attempt for {} is recorded
predicate_mappings.finalizing_case_pattern_association: finalizing the case pattern association for {} with {}
predicate_mappings.finalizing_case_pattern_recorded: the case pattern for {} with {} is finalized
predicate_mappings.preparatory_notification_sent: a preparatory notification has been sent for {}
predicate_mappings.case_care_team_role_association: {} is associated with the care team role {}
predicate_mappings.holding_case_pattern_association: {} is associated with the holding case pattern {}
predicate_mappings.case_provisional_block_assignment: {} has a provisional block assignment of {}
predicate_mappings.holding_case_booking_pattern_link: {} is holding a case booking pattern link with {}

create_recall_case.description: create recall case a recall case A
preconditions: I can only create recall case a recall case A if it is not the case that the case A is registered and it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I create recall case a recall case A, it is the case that the case A is registered

claim_time_slot_candidate.description: claim a time slot candidate B for a recall case A
preconditions: I can only claim a time slot candidate B for a recall case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is a time slot available and A is compatible with B
I can only claim a time slot candidate B for a recall case A if it is not the case that the slot for the case A is claimed
effects: Once I claim a time slot candidate B for a recall case A, it is the case that the case A is allocated the slot B and the slot for the case A is claimed
Once I claim a time slot candidate B for a recall case A, it is not the case anymore that B is a time slot available

release_claimed_time_slot.description: release a claimed time slot candidate B for a recall case A
preconditions: I can only release a claimed time slot candidate B for a recall case A if it is the case that the case A is allocated the slot B
I can only release a claimed time slot candidate B for a recall case A if it is not the case that A has a confirmed appointment flag and it is not the case that A has verified eligibility
effects: Once I release a claimed time slot candidate B for a recall case A, it is the case that B is a time slot available

Once I release a claimed time slot candidate B for a recall case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is allocated the slot B and it is not the case anymore that the slot for the case A is claimed and it is not the case anymore that the patient contact for A is confirmed and it is not the case anymore that preappointment checks for A are complete and it is not the case anymore that a contact attempt for A is recorded and it is not the case anymore that readiness for A is certified and it is not the case anymore that A has a resource conflict flag

assign_provisional_time_block.description: assign a provisional time block B to a recall case A
preconditions: I can only assign a provisional time block B to a recall case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is an available provisional block
effects: Once I assign a provisional time block B to a recall case A, it is the case that A has a provisional block assignment of B
Once I assign a provisional time block B to a recall case A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available provisional block

release_provisional_time_block.description: release a provisional time block B from a recall case A
preconditions: I can only release a provisional time block B from a recall case A if it is the case that A has a provisional block assignment of B
effects: Once I release a provisional time block B from a recall case A, it is the case that B is an available provisional block
Once I release a provisional time block B from a recall case A, it is not the case anymore that A has a provisional block assignment of B

confirm_contact_for_provisional_block.description: confirm contact for a recall case A with a provisional time block B
preconditions: I can only confirm contact for a recall case A with a provisional time block B if it is the case that the case A is registered and the slot for the case A is claimed and A has a provisional block assignment of B
I can only confirm contact for a recall case A with a provisional time block B if it is not the case that the patient contact for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm contact for a recall case A with a provisional time block B, it is the case that the patient contact for A is confirmed

confirm_contact_via_channel.description: confirm contact for a recall case A via a communication channel B
preconditions: I can only confirm contact for a recall case A via a communication channel B if it is the case that the case A is registered and the slot for the case A is claimed and B is an available communication channel
I can only confirm contact for a recall case A via a communication channel B if it is not the case that the patient contact for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm contact for a recall case A via a communication channel B, it is the case that the patient contact for A is confirmed and a contact attempt for A is recorded
Once I confirm contact for a recall case A via a communication channel B, it is not the case anymore that B is an available communication channel

complete_preappointment_checks_with_admi.description: complete preappointment checks for a recall case A with a scheduling administrator C during a provisional time block B
preconditions: I can only complete preappointment checks for a recall case A with a scheduling administrator C during a provisional time block B if it is the case that the patient contact for A is confirmed and the slot for the case A is claimed and A has a provisional block assignment of B and scheduling admin available C
I can only complete preappointment checks for a recall case A with a scheduling administrator C during a provisional time block B if it is not the case that preappointment checks for A are complete
effects: Once I complete preappointment checks for a recall case A with a scheduling administrator C during a provisional time block B, it is the case that preappointment checks for A are complete
Once I complete preappointment checks for a recall case A with a scheduling administrator C during a provisional time block B, it is not the case anymore that a contact attempt for A is recorded

complete_preparation_using_booking_patte.description: complete preparation for a recall case A using a booking pattern B
preconditions: I can only complete preparation for a recall case A using a booking pattern B if it is the case that the slot for the case A is claimed and the case pattern for A with B is finalized
I can only complete preparation for a recall case A using a booking pattern B if it is not the case that preappointment checks for A are complete
effects: Once I complete preparation for a recall case A using a booking pattern B, it is the case that preappointment checks for A are complete
Once I complete preparation for a recall case A using a booking pattern B, it is not the case anymore that a contact attempt for A is recorded

reserve_clinician_for_case.description: reserve a clinician resource B for a recall case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a clinician resource B for a recall case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is an available clinician and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a clinician resource B for a recall case A, it is the case that A is assigned to clinician B
Once I reserve a clinician resource B for a recall case A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available clinician

release_clinician_reservation.description: release clinician reservation for a recall case A from a clinician resource B
preconditions: I can only release clinician reservation for a recall case A from a clinician resource B if it is the case that A is assigned to clinician B
effects: Once I release clinician reservation for a recall case A from a clinician resource B, it is the case that B is an available clinician
Once I release clinician reservation for a recall case A from a clinician resource B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to clinician B

reserve_location_for_case.description: reserve a clinical location B for a recall case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a clinical location B for a recall case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is an available location and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a clinical location B for a recall case A, it is the case that A is assigned to location B
Once I reserve a clinical location B for a recall case A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available location

release_location_reservation.description: release reservation of a clinical location B for a recall case A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a clinical location B for a recall case A if it is the case that A is assigned to location B
effects: Once I release reservation of a clinical location B for a recall case A, it is the case that B is an available location
Once I release reservation of a clinical location B for a recall case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to location B

reserve_diagnostic_service_for_case.description: reserve a diagnostic service B for a recall case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a diagnostic service B for a recall case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is an available diagnostic service and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a diagnostic service B for a recall case A, it is the case that A is assigned to diagnostic service B
Once I reserve a diagnostic service B for a recall case A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available diagnostic service

release_diagnostic_service_reservation.description: release reservation of a diagnostic service B for a recall case A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a diagnostic service B for a recall case A if it is the case that A is assigned to diagnostic service B
effects: Once I release reservation of a diagnostic service B for a recall case A, it is the case that B is an available diagnostic service
Once I release reservation of a diagnostic service B for a recall case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to diagnostic service B

reserve_ancillary_for_case.description: reserve an ancillary provider B for a recall case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an ancillary provider B for a recall case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available as ancillary and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve an ancillary provider B for a recall case A, it is the case that A is assigned to ancillary provider B
Once I reserve an ancillary provider B for a recall case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as ancillary

release_ancillary_reservation.description: release ancillary reservation of a recall case A from an ancillary provider B
preconditions: I can only release ancillary reservation of a recall case A from an ancillary provider B if it is the case that A is assigned to ancillary provider B
effects: Once I release ancillary reservation of a recall case A from an ancillary provider B, it is the case that B is available as ancillary
Once I release ancillary reservation of a recall case A from an ancillary provider B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to ancillary provider B

construct_multiresource_appointment.description: construct multiresource appointment for a recall case A with an appointment type B using a clinician resource C at a clinical location D
preconditions: I can only construct multiresource appointment for a recall case A with an appointment type B using a clinician resource C at a clinical location D if it is the case that the slot for the case A is claimed and A is assigned to clinician C and A is assigned to location D and B is an available appointment type and A is compatible with B

I can only construct multiresource appointment for a recall case A with an appointment type B using a clinician resource C at a clinical location D if it is not the case that A has a confirmed appointment flag
effects: Once I construct multiresource appointment for a recall case A with an appointment type B using a clinician resource C at a clinical location D, it is the case that A has appointment type B and A has a confirmed appointment flag

Once I construct multiresource appointment for a recall case A with an appointment type B using a clinician resource C at a clinical location D, it is not the case anymore that B is an available appointment type

construct_multiresource_appointment_with.description: construct multiresource appointment with equipment for a recall case A with an appointment type B using a diagnostic service C and an equipment resource D
preconditions: I can only construct multiresource appointment with equipment for a recall case A with an appointment type B using a diagnostic service C and an equipment resource D if it is the case that the slot for the case A is claimed and A is assigned to diagnostic service C and D is available as equipment and B is an available appointment type and A is compatible with B and A is compatible with D

I can only construct multiresource appointment with equipment for a recall case A with an appointment type B using a diagnostic service C and an equipment resource D if it is not the case that A has a confirmed appointment flag
effects: Once I construct multiresource appointment with equipment for a recall case A with an appointment type B using a diagnostic service C and an equipment resource D, it is the case that A has appointment type B and A has a confirmed appointment flag and A has a resource conflict flag and a contact attempt for A is recorded

Once I construct multiresource appointment with equipment for a recall case A with an appointment type B using a diagnostic service C and an equipment resource D, it is not the case anymore that B is an available appointment type and it is not the case anymore that D is available as equipment

clear_conflicts_after_validation.description: clear conflicts after validation for a recall case A with a clinician resource B at a clinical location C
preconditions: I can only clear conflicts after validation for a recall case A with a clinician resource B at a clinical location C if it is the case that A has a confirmed appointment flag and A has a resource conflict flag and A is assigned to clinician B and A is assigned to location C
effects: Once I clear conflicts after validation for a recall case A with a clinician resource B at a clinical location C, it is not the case anymore that A has a resource conflict flag and it is not the case anymore that a contact attempt for A is recorded

certify_eligibility.description: certify eligibility for a recall case A with a clinician resource B at a clinical location C during a clinician shift D
preconditions: I can only certify eligibility for a recall case A with a clinician resource B at a clinical location C during a clinician shift D if it is the case that preappointment checks for A are complete and A has a confirmed appointment flag and A is assigned to clinician B and A is assigned to location C and A is associated with the care team role D

I can only certify eligibility for a recall case A with a clinician resource B at a clinical location C during a clinician shift D if it is not the case that a contact attempt for A is recorded and it is not the case that A has verified eligibility
effects: Once I certify eligibility for a recall case A with a clinician resource B at a clinical location C during a clinician shift D, it is the case that A has verified eligibility

certify_eligibility_with_shifts.description: certify eligibility for a recall case A with a diagnostic service B and an ancillary provider C during a coordinator shift D
preconditions: I can only certify eligibility for a recall case A with a diagnostic service B and an ancillary provider C during a coordinator shift D if it is the case that preappointment checks for A are complete and A has a confirmed appointment flag and A is assigned to diagnostic service B and A is assigned to ancillary provider C and A is associated with the care team role D
I can only certify eligibility for a recall case A with a diagnostic service B and an ancillary provider C during a coordinator shift D if it is not the case that A has verified eligibility
effects: Once I certify eligibility for a recall case A with a diagnostic service B and an ancillary provider C during a coordinator shift D, it is the case that A has verified eligibility and a contact attempt for A is recorded

confirm_appointment_and_mark_ready.description: confirm appointment and mark a recall case A as ready with a clinician resource B at a clinical location C
preconditions: I can only confirm appointment and mark a recall case A as ready with a clinician resource B at a clinical location C if it is the case that A has verified eligibility and a contact attempt for A is recorded and A is assigned to clinician B and A is assigned to location C
effects: Once I confirm appointment and mark a recall case A as ready with a clinician resource B at a clinical location C, it is the case that readiness for A is certified

Once I confirm appointment and mark a recall case A as ready with a clinician resource B at a clinical location C, it is not the case anymore that a contact attempt for A is recorded and it is not the case anymore that preappointment checks for A are complete and it is not the case anymore that A has a resource conflict flag

reapply_preappointment_checks_with_block.description: reapply preappointment checks for a recall case A with a provisional time block B by a scheduling administrator C
preconditions: I can only reapply preappointment checks for a recall case A with a provisional time block B by a scheduling administrator C if it is the case that readiness for A is certified and A has verified eligibility and the slot for the case A is claimed and A has a provisional block assignment of B and scheduling admin available C
I can only reapply preappointment checks for a recall case A with a provisional time block B by a scheduling administrator C if it is not the case that preappointment checks for A are complete
effects: Once I reapply preappointment checks for a recall case A with a provisional time block B by a scheduling administrator C, it is the case that preappointment checks for A are complete

acknowledge_provisional_block_for_case.description: acknowledge provisional block a provisional time block B for a recall case A
preconditions: I can only acknowledge provisional block a provisional time block B for a recall case A if it is the case that A has verified eligibility and preappointment checks for A are complete and A has a provisional block assignment of B

I can only acknowledge provisional block a provisional time block B for a recall case A if it is not the case that a contact attempt for A is recorded and it is not the case that A has a provisional block acknowledged
effects: Once I acknowledge provisional block a provisional time block B for a recall case A, it is the case that A has a provisional block acknowledged

acknowledge_communication_channel.description: acknowledge a communication channel B for a recall case A
preconditions: I can only acknowledge a communication channel B for a recall case A if it is the case that A has verified eligibility and preappointment checks for A are complete and B is an available communication channel
I can only acknowledge a communication channel B for a recall case A if it is not the case that a contact attempt for A is recorded and it is not the case that A has a provisional block acknowledged
effects: Once I acknowledge a communication channel B for a recall case A, it is the case that A has a provisional block acknowledged
Once I acknowledge a communication channel B for a recall case A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available communication channel

allocate_booking_pattern_hold.description: allocate booking pattern hold for a recall case A with a booking pattern B
preconditions: I can only allocate booking pattern hold for a recall case A with a booking pattern B if it is the case that A has a provisional block acknowledged and B has an available slot and A is holding a case booking pattern link with B
effects: Once I allocate booking pattern hold for a recall case A with a booking pattern B, it is the case that A is associated with the holding case pattern B
Once I allocate booking pattern hold for a recall case A with a booking pattern B, it is not the case anymore that B has an available slot

transfer_booking_pattern_from_holder.description: transfer booking pattern a booking pattern C from a holding case B to a finalizing case A
preconditions: I can only transfer booking pattern a booking pattern C from a holding case B to a finalizing case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and A has a finalizing case flag and finalizing the case pattern association for A with C and B is associated with the holding case pattern C
I can only transfer booking pattern a booking pattern C from a holding case B to a finalizing case A if it is not the case that the case pattern for A with C is finalized
effects: Once I transfer booking pattern a booking pattern C from a holding case B to a finalizing case A, it is the case that the case pattern for A with C is finalized

mark_preparatory_notification_sent.description: mark preparatory notification as sent for a recall case A with a provisional time block B by a scheduling administrator C
preconditions: I can only mark preparatory notification as sent for a recall case A with a provisional time block B by a scheduling administrator C if it is the case that the case A is registered and A has a finalizing case flag and preappointment checks for A are complete and A has a provisional block acknowledged and A has a provisional block assignment of B and scheduling admin available C

I can only mark preparatory notification as sent for a recall case A with a provisional time block B by a scheduling administrator C if it is not the case that a preparatory notification has been sent for A
effects: Once I mark preparatory notification as sent for a recall case A with a provisional time block B by a scheduling administrator C, it is the case that a preparatory notification has been sent for A

preconditions: I can only finalize a recall case A if it is the case that A has a holding case flag and the case A is registered and the slot for the case A is claimed and A has a confirmed appointment flag and A has verified eligibility and A has a provisional block acknowledged and preappointment checks for A are complete
I can only finalize a recall case A if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize a recall case A, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_case_with_pattern.description: finalize a recall case A with a booking pattern B
preconditions: I can only finalize a recall case A with a booking pattern B if it is the case that A has a finalizing case flag and the case A is registered and the slot for the case A is claimed and A has a confirmed appointment flag and A has verified eligibility and A has a provisional block acknowledged and preappointment checks for A are complete and the case pattern for A with B is finalized
I can only finalize a recall case A with a booking pattern B if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize a recall case A with a booking pattern B, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_case_with_notification.description: finalize a recall case A with notification
preconditions: I can only finalize a recall case A with notification if it is the case that A has a finalizing case flag and the case A is registered and the slot for the case A is claimed and A has a confirmed appointment flag and A has verified eligibility and A has a provisional block acknowledged and preappointment checks for A are complete and a preparatory notification has been sent for A
I can only finalize a recall case A with notification if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize a recall case A with notification, it is the case that A is finalized

action_nl_templates.claim_time_slot_candidate: claim time slot candidate {?time_slot_candidate} for recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates.release_claimed_time_slot: release claimed time slot candidate {?time_slot_candidate} for recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_provisional_time_block: assign provisional time block {?provisional_time_block} to recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates.release_provisional_time_block: release provisional time block {?provisional_time_block} from recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_contact_for_provisional_block: confirm contact for recall case {?recall_case} with provisional time block {?provisional_time_block}
action_nl_templates.confirm_contact_via_channel: confirm contact for recall case {?recall_case} via communication channel {?communication_channel}
action_nl_templates.complete_preappointment_checks_with_admi: complete preappointment checks for recall case {?recall_case} with scheduling administrator {?scheduling_administrator} during provisional time block {?provisional_time_block}
action_nl_templates.complete_preparation_using_booking_patte: complete preparation for recall case {?recall_case} using booking pattern {?booking_pattern}
action_nl_templates.reserve_clinician_for_case: reserve clinician resource {?clinician_resource} for recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates.release_clinician_reservation: release clinician reservation for recall case {?recall_case} from clinician resource {?clinician_resource}
action_nl_templates.reserve_location_for_case: reserve clinical location {?clinical_location} for recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates.release_location_reservation: release reservation of clinical location {?clinical_location} for recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_diagnostic_service_for_case: reserve diagnostic service {?diagnostic_service} for recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates.release_diagnostic_service_reservation: release reservation of diagnostic service {?diagnostic_service} for recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_ancillary_for_case: reserve ancillary provider {?ancillary_provider} for recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates.release_ancillary_reservation: release ancillary reservation of recall case {?recall_case} from ancillary provider {?ancillary_provider}
action_nl_templates.construct_multiresource_appointment: construct multiresource appointment for recall case {?recall_case} with appointment type {?appointment_type} using clinician resource {?clinician_resource} at clinical location {?clinical_location}
action_nl_templates.construct_multiresource_appointment_with: construct multiresource appointment with equipment for recall case {?recall_case} with appointment type {?appointment_type} using diagnostic service {?diagnostic_service} and equipment resource {?equipment_resource}
action_nl_templates.clear_conflicts_after_validation: clear conflicts after validation for recall case {?recall_case} with clinician resource {?clinician_resource} at clinical location {?clinical_location}
action_nl_templates.certify_eligibility: certify eligibility for recall case {?recall_case} with clinician resource {?clinician_resource} at clinical location {?clinical_location} during clinician shift {?clinician_shift}
action_nl_templates.certify_eligibility_with_shifts: certify eligibility for recall case {?recall_case} with diagnostic service {?diagnostic_service} and ancillary provider {?ancillary_provider} during coordinator shift {?coordinator_shift}
action_nl_templates.confirm_appointment_and_mark_ready: confirm appointment and mark recall case {?recall_case} as ready with clinician resource {?clinician_resource} at clinical location {?clinical_location}
action_nl_templates.reapply_preappointment_checks_with_block: reapply preappointment checks for recall case {?recall_case} with provisional time block {?provisional_time_block} by scheduling administrator {?scheduling_administrator}
action_nl_templates.acknowledge_provisional_block_for_case: acknowledge provisional block provisional time block {?provisional_time_block} for recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates.acknowledge_communication_channel: acknowledge communication channel {?communication_channel} for recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates.allocate_booking_pattern_hold: allocate booking pattern hold for recall case {?recall_case} with booking pattern {?booking_pattern}
action_nl_templates.transfer_booking_pattern_from_holder: transfer booking pattern booking pattern {?booking_pattern} from holding case {?holding_case} to finalizing case {?finalizing_case}
action_nl_templates.mark_preparatory_notification_sent: mark preparatory notification as sent for recall case {?recall_case} with provisional time block {?provisional_time_block} by scheduling administrator {?scheduling_administrator}
action_nl_templates.finalize_case_with_pattern: finalize recall case {?recall_case} with booking pattern {?booking_pattern}

predicate_nl_templates.case_allocated_slot: the case {?recall_case} is allocated the slot {?time_slot_candidate}
predicate_nl_templates.case_slot_claimed: the slot for the case {?recall_case} is claimed
predicate_nl_templates.patient_contact_confirmed: the patient contact for {?recall_case} is confirmed
predicate_nl_templates.contact_attempt_recorded: a contact attempt for {?recall_case} is recorded
predicate_nl_templates.finalizing_case_pattern_association: finalizing the case pattern association for {?recall_case} with {?booking_pattern}
predicate_nl_templates.finalizing_case_pattern_recorded: the case pattern for {?recall_case} with {?booking_pattern} is finalized
predicate_nl_templates.preparatory_notification_sent: a preparatory notification has been sent for {?recall_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_care_team_role_association: {?recall_case} is associated with the care team role {?care_team_role}
predicate_nl_templates.holding_case_pattern_association: {?recall_case} is associated with the holding case pattern {?booking_pattern}
predicate_nl_templates.case_provisional_block_assignment: {?recall_case} has a provisional block assignment of {?provisional_time_block}
predicate_nl_templates.holding_case_booking_pattern_link: {?recall_case} is holding a case booking pattern link with {?booking_pattern}

action_nl_templates_indef.create_recall_case: create recall case a recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.claim_time_slot_candidate: claim a time slot candidate {?time_slot_candidate} for a recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_claimed_time_slot: release a claimed time slot candidate {?time_slot_candidate} for a recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_provisional_time_block: assign a provisional time block {?provisional_time_block} to a recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_provisional_time_block: release a provisional time block {?provisional_time_block} from a recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_contact_for_provisional_block: confirm contact for a recall case {?recall_case} with a provisional time block {?provisional_time_block}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_contact_via_channel: confirm contact for a recall case {?recall_case} via a communication channel {?communication_channel}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_preappointment_checks_with_admi: complete preappointment checks for a recall case {?recall_case} with a scheduling administrator {?scheduling_administrator} during a provisional time block {?provisional_time_block}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_preparation_using_booking_patte: complete preparation for a recall case {?recall_case} using a booking pattern {?booking_pattern}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_clinician_for_case: reserve a clinician resource {?clinician_resource} for a recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_clinician_reservation: release clinician reservation for a recall case {?recall_case} from a clinician resource {?clinician_resource}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_location_for_case: reserve a clinical location {?clinical_location} for a recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_location_reservation: release reservation of a clinical location {?clinical_location} for a recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_diagnostic_service_for_case: reserve a diagnostic service {?diagnostic_service} for a recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_diagnostic_service_reservation: release reservation of a diagnostic service {?diagnostic_service} for a recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_ancillary_for_case: reserve an ancillary provider {?ancillary_provider} for a recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_ancillary_reservation: release ancillary reservation of a recall case {?recall_case} from an ancillary provider {?ancillary_provider}
action_nl_templates_indef.construct_multiresource_appointment: construct multiresource appointment for a recall case {?recall_case} with an appointment type {?appointment_type} using a clinician resource {?clinician_resource} at a clinical location {?clinical_location}
action_nl_templates_indef.construct_multiresource_appointment_with: construct multiresource appointment with equipment for a recall case {?recall_case} with an appointment type {?appointment_type} using a diagnostic service {?diagnostic_service} and an equipment resource {?equipment_resource}
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_conflicts_after_validation: clear conflicts after validation for a recall case {?recall_case} with a clinician resource {?clinician_resource} at a clinical location {?clinical_location}
action_nl_templates_indef.certify_eligibility: certify eligibility for a recall case {?recall_case} with a clinician resource {?clinician_resource} at a clinical location {?clinical_location} during a clinician shift {?clinician_shift}
action_nl_templates_indef.certify_eligibility_with_shifts: certify eligibility for a recall case {?recall_case} with a diagnostic service {?diagnostic_service} and an ancillary provider {?ancillary_provider} during a coordinator shift {?coordinator_shift}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_appointment_and_mark_ready: confirm appointment and mark a recall case {?recall_case} as ready with a clinician resource {?clinician_resource} at a clinical location {?clinical_location}
action_nl_templates_indef.reapply_preappointment_checks_with_block: reapply preappointment checks for a recall case {?recall_case} with a provisional time block {?provisional_time_block} by a scheduling administrator {?scheduling_administrator}
action_nl_templates_indef.acknowledge_provisional_block_for_case: acknowledge provisional block a provisional time block {?provisional_time_block} for a recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.acknowledge_communication_channel: acknowledge a communication channel {?communication_channel} for a recall case {?recall_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.allocate_booking_pattern_hold: allocate booking pattern hold for a recall case {?recall_case} with a booking pattern {?booking_pattern}
action_nl_templates_indef.transfer_booking_pattern_from_holder: transfer booking pattern a booking pattern {?booking_pattern} from a holding case {?holding_case} to a finalizing case {?finalizing_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_preparatory_notification_sent: mark preparatory notification as sent for a recall case {?recall_case} with a provisional time block {?provisional_time_block} by a scheduling administrator {?scheduling_administrator}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_case_with_pattern: finalize a recall case {?recall_case} with a booking pattern {?booking_pattern}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_case_with_notification: finalize a recall case {?recall_case} with notification

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a recall case or a time slot candidate or a appointment type or a clinical location or a clinician resource or a diagnostic service or a provisional time block or a communication channel or a booking pattern or a scheduling administrator or a equipment resource or a ancillary provider or a care team role is also a object
Everything that is a clinician shift or a coordinator shift is also a care team role
Everything that is a holding case or a finalizing case is also a recall case
